discovery_confirm.title: Set up {name}
discovery_confirm.description: Found a Koti tablet, "{name}", on your network. Add it as a media player?

user.title: Add a Koti player manually
user.description: Only needed if auto-discovery didn't find your tablet. Enter its IP address (Settings → Device Name in the Koti app shows the tablet's own name).

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach a Koti player at that address.

abort.already_configured: This Koti player is already configured.
abort.no_device_id: The discovered device didn't report an id.
